description_long: This is a black Nike backpack featuring a large, bold white Nike logo and swoosh diagonally across the front panel. The exterior material appears to be water-resistant, with a subtle dotted texture that suggests added durability and grip. The backpack has two adjustable shoulder straps and a small top handle for carrying. There is a main compartment accessed by a zipper at the top, and a front zipper pocket is also visible. The overall shape is rectangular with slightly rounded edges, and the design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments. The backpack's surface has a slightly glossy finish, likely due to the water-resistant coating.
description: A black Nike backpack with a large white logo, water-resistant textured surface, and multiple zippered compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Nike logo and swoosh, front zipper pocket, and main compartment zipper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the backpack's depth, side panel, and the curvature of the straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two adjustable shoulder straps and the top handle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side panel and the profile of the straps.
attribute_brand_logo: A large white Nike logo with the swoosh, diagonally placed across the front panel, occupying most of the visible surface.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, adjustable shoulder straps with a visible top handle; straps appear padded and ergonomic.
attribute_zipper_placement: One zipper at the top for the main compartment, one horizontal zipper on the front pocket.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed from the top, one front external pocket with a horizontal zipper; no visible side or mesh pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Large white Nike logo and swoosh on the front; subtle dotted texture on the black fabric.
